n.description: Sample size, the number of individuals in the simple random sample.

p.description: Prevalence of asthma in the population, used as the probability of success in each trial.

q.description: Probability of not having asthma (1 - p), used as the probability of failure in each trial.

x.description: The number of asthmatics observed in the sample, set to 0 for this problem asking the probability of observing no asthmatics.
